sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58449" key="koinwnatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοινων-ᾱτικός</orth>, <sense id="n58449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">generous, liberal</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diotog.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
